sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: nCino (NCNO) Exceeds Expectations for Q4 Earnings and Revenue
feed.summary: nCino (NCNO) reported strong Q4 earnings, with $0.37 per share, significantly beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.21. The company also surpassed revenue expectations, generating $149.67 million for the quarter. Despite a year-to-date stock decline, investors are looking to future earnings estimates and management guidance for insights into nCino's prospects.

feed.title: Movado (NYSE: MOV) SVP sees 1,467 shares withheld to cover taxes
feed.summary: Movado Senior VP and General Counsel Mitchell Cole Sussis had 1,467 shares of common stock withheld for tax obligations on March 27, 2026. This transaction was related to stock awards granted on March 27, 2023, and the shares were valued at $24.05 each. After this withholding, Sussis directly holds 46,030 shares of Movado.

feed.title: Movado Group (NYSE: MOV) SVP stock award leads to 230-share tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group's Senior Vice President and Principal Accounting Officer, Linda Feeney, reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 230 shares of common stock were withheld by the company to cover tax obligations from vested stock awards. This non-market transaction on March 27, priced at $24.05 per share, leaves Feeney with 5,240 directly held shares of Movado common stock. The event is characterized as a standard administrative process rather than a market sale.

feed.title: Movado Group Inc (MOV) EVP uses 2,723 shares to cover tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group Inc.'s EVP & COO, Behzad Soltani, reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 2,723 shares of common stock, valued at $24.05 each, were withheld by the company. This action satisfied tax withholding obligations on vested stock awards, leaving Soltani with 81,042.204 shares directly held. This transaction is categorized as a tax-withholding disposition rather than an open-market sale, and is considered neutral in its impact on the company.

feed.title: Movado Group (MOV) SVP uses 2,155 shares to cover tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group's Senior Vice President of Human Resources, Michelle Kennedy, reported the disposition of 2,155 shares of common stock on March 27, 2026. These shares were withheld by the company at $24.05 per share to satisfy tax withholding obligations upon the vesting of previously granted stock awards. After this transaction, Kennedy directly holds 35,927.834 shares of Movado common stock.

feed.title: MaxCyte (MXCT) CEO awarded 600,000 options and 300,000 RSUs
feed.summary: MaxCyte (MXCT) CEO Masoud Maher was granted an equity compensation package including 600,000 stock options and 300,000 restricted stock units (RSUs). The stock options have an exercise price of $0.684 per share and expire in 2036, with vesting tied to continued service. The RSUs also vest over several years, contingent on his employment with the company.

feed.title: NNN REIT, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
feed.summary: NNN REIT, Inc. (NYSE: NNN) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 results before the market opens on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss its financial and operating results. A live webcast will be available on their website, with a telephonic replay accessible until May 14, 2026.

feed.title: Average basic shares outstanding of Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II – NASDAQ:MLAAW
feed.summary: This article provides access to the average basic shares outstanding data for Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II (NASDAQ: MLAAW) on TradingView. It indicates that the market was closed at the time of viewing and offers various financial and market data tools related to the company.

feed.title: PYPL DEADLINE NOTICE: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Investors Encouraged to Contact Kirby McInerney LLP By April 20, 2026
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP is encouraging investors in PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) who suffered losses to contact them by April 20, 2026, to discuss a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges PayPal created a false impression of its revenue outlook and growth, minimizing risks, and that its 2027 financial targets were unrealistic. Following disappointing Q4 2025 results and the withdrawal of 2027 targets, PayPal's stock price declined significantly.

feed.title: Tech giant Apple celebrates 50th anniversary
feed.summary: Cupertino tech giant Apple is celebrating its 50th anniversary. The company, co-founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak, has significantly influenced technology and people's lives over five decades. This milestone highlights Apple's enduring impact as a recognizable brand.

feed.title: State Street Names New Global Controller and CAO
feed.summary: State Street has appointed C. Jack Read as Executive Vice President, Global Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer, effective August 10, 2026. Read brings extensive experience from several financial institutions, and his compensation package includes a $450,000 annual base salary plus incentive awards and one-time transition payments to offset forfeited compensation from his previous role. The company's stock currently holds a Buy rating from analysts with a $155.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" rates it as Neutral due to mixed financials.

feed.title: Microsoft in talks with Chevron, Engine No.1 over power deal- Bloomberg
feed.summary: Microsoft is reportedly in exclusive discussions with Chevron and Engine No. 1 for a significant energy complex in West Texas. This proposed natural gas-fired plant, estimated to cost around $7 billion and generate 2,500 megawatts, would power a Microsoft data center campus. The initiative highlights Microsoft's efforts to secure electricity for its expanding data center capacity, driven by the increasing demands of AI technology.

feed.title: Dow transforms global B2B experience with Adobe solutions
feed.summary: Dow has significantly revamped its global B2B engagement by implementing Adobe solutions, leading to faster content delivery, increased homepage engagement, and substantial audience growth. Through tools like Adobe Experience Manager and Real-Time CDP B2B Edition, Dow unified customer data, streamlined content, automated workflows, and personalized customer journeys across 160 countries. This digital transformation has not only improved customer satisfaction and transaction speeds but also fostered a digital-first mindset within the organization.

feed.title: Cramer’s Copper Concerns And Board Change Test Freeport-McMoRan Valuation
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has expressed concerns about Freeport-McMoRan's copper outlook, citing peaking demand and slower growth in China, which could make the stock a risky short-term investment despite its current undervaluation. Adding to this caution, long-serving director Robert W. Dudley will not seek re-election, hinting at future board changes. Investors are advised to monitor the company's communication on capital plans and risk management as these factors unfold.

feed.title: Does Index Inclusion And Cramer Spotlight Shift The AI Insurance Narrative For Lemonade (LMND)?
feed.summary: Lemonade (LMND) has gained attention due to its inclusion in the NASDAQ Internet Index and a spotlight from Jim Cramer on CNBC's Mad Money, highlighting its AI-driven business model and shrinking losses. This increased focus is drawing attention to the company's use of AI to transform insurance operations and improve its financial profile. While index inclusion and media attention may generate short-term trading interest, the core investment narrative for Lemonade still hinges on its ability to further narrow losses through its AI-centric model and manage risks like claims volatility and competition.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Volatility
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has seen a stock price adjustment to $473.36 from $488.85, reflecting significant volatility over the past year. Technical indicators show mixed signals, and its recent performance has lagged the S&P 500. However, the company has outperformed the S&P 500 over a ten-year period.

feed.title: Meritage Homes Corp. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Mixed Market Signals
feed.summary: Meritage Homes Corp. is facing a stock evaluation revision due to mixed technical indicators, suggesting bearish trends like MACD and Bollinger Bands signals. While the stock recently outperformed the S&P 500 over the past week, its year-to-date and annual performance shows significant underperformance. The company's current stock price is $60.00, falling within its 52-week range of $58.03 to $84.73.

feed.title: Medical Properties Trust Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Medical Properties Trust, Inc. is undergoing a technical trend adjustment with its stock currently priced at $4.53, reflecting significant declines over the past one and five years compared to the S&P 500. Technical indicators show a mixed outlook, with some suggesting bearish conditions while others indicate a mildly bullish trend. The company faces ongoing struggles in a competitive market, highlighted by its underperformance relative to the broader market.

feed.title: Markel Group, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Markel Group, Inc. has undergone a stock evaluation revision due to changing market conditions, with its stock currently priced at $1,867.29 after a slight decline over the past year. While recent performance lags behind the S&P 500, Markel has shown resilience and outperformed the S&P 500 over three and five-year periods. Technical indicators show mixed signals, with some bearish and some mildly bullish trends.

feed.title: Modular Medical Enacts Reverse Split to Maintain Nasdaq Listing
feed.summary: Modular Medical (MODD) executed a 1-for-30 reverse stock split on March 31, 2026, significantly reducing its outstanding shares from approximately 139.8 million to 4.66 million. This action aims to elevate the company's per-share trading price to meet Nasdaq's $1.00 minimum bid requirement and maintain its listing. The reverse split preserved investor voting rights and kept the authorized share count unchanged, with fractional shares being compensated in cash.

feed.title: Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) Short Interest Up 21.1% in March
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) experienced a 21.1% increase in short interest during March, with 6,045,787 shares sold short as of March 13th. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $245.67. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and declared a dividend of $0.5107.

feed.title: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (DRVN) Class Action Lawsuit: Investors Face May 8, 2026, Deadline
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between May 9, 2023, and February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Driven Brands made material misstatements and/or omissions regarding its accounting and internal controls, leading to errors in financial reporting. Investors have until May 8, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in the lawsuit.

feed.title: How is Modine Becoming a Higher-Quality Stock Than Before?
feed.summary: Modine Manufacturing (MOD) is transforming from a cyclical thermal components supplier to a higher-growth, higher-margin climate solutions player, driven by strong growth in its Climate Solutions segment and data center cooling business. This strategic shift, including the planned divestiture of its Performance Technologies segment, is improving its earnings quality and operating margins, pushing its valuation above traditional peers. While still evolving, Modine aims to align with higher-quality industrial and HVAC companies like Trane Technologies and Johnson Controls.

feed.title: LASR Stock: Defense Backlog vs. Margin Risk in 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: nLIGHT (LASR) is entering 2026 with strong defense-led growth, with aerospace and defense revenues rising 60% in 2025. However, revenue timing, product mix, and factory utilization could lead to uneven quarterly earnings, despite a significant funded backlog. The company is also exiting cutting and welding, creating near-term revenue headwinds, and faces margin sensitivity due to mix and utilization.

feed.title: Miniso Group Holding (NYSE:MNSO) Quarterly Loss Challenges Bullish Margin Narratives
feed.summary: MINISO Group Holding (NYSE:MNSO) recently reported its FY 2025 Q4 results, showing a quarterly revenue increase but a net loss and compressed profit margins. While bulls point to international expansion and proprietary IP growth drivers, bears highlight rising costs and store expansion risks impacting profitability. The article suggests investors closely analyze these mixed signals regarding long-term growth prospects amidst current valuation.

feed.title: Corvex, Inc. (MOVE) CEO details Form 3 option and preferred stakes
feed.summary: Corvex, Inc. CEO Crystal John Adler III has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) for MOVE. The filing details his direct holdings of 3,054,235 common shares, an incentive stock option for 2,902,143 shares at $10.06, and various Series B and Series C convertible preferred stocks, some held indirectly through his Roth IRA. These holdings outline his initial equity stake following the recent Corvex-Movano merger.

feed.title: Omnicom Media NZ Appoints Chief Transformation Officer, Group Product Director
feed.summary: Omnicom Media New Zealand has appointed Rachel Bayfield as chief transformation officer and Mike Delaney as group product director to bolster its Centre of Excellence. These new roles will strengthen the company's data and technology capabilities, focusing on digital transformation and enhancing product offerings for clients. Bayfield and Delaney bring extensive experience in marketing, data, and digital strategy, aiming to drive smarter marketing outcomes and deliver value to clients.

feed.title: D.R. Horton (DHI) Expands Credit Facilities with Strategic Amendments
feed.summary: D.R. Horton (DHI) has strategically amended its credit agreements, significantly enhancing its financial flexibility and capacity. The homebuilder increased its Aggregate Revolving Credit Commitment to $3.295 billion and raised the Aggregate Credit Facility Limit to $4.0 billion, extending maturities and modifying interest rates. Its subsidiary, DRH Rental, Inc., also extended its $1.050 billion revolving credit facility to March 27, 2030, reflecting the company's proactive financial management for operational and growth strategies.

feed.title: Alexandria Equities Adopts Simple Majority Director Removal Standard
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) has changed its director removal standard, now allowing directors to be removed by a simple majority stockholder vote instead of the previous two-thirds requirement. This change, effective March 31, 2026, was approved by the board and supported by stockholders, aiming to increase shareholder influence. Currently, analysts rate ARE as a Hold with a $47.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Neutral due to mixed fundamentals.

feed.title: Labcorp Sets Date for First-Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Labcorp (LH) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 30, 2026, before market open, followed by a webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET. The company will provide detailed financial materials on its investor relations website. This announcement highlights Labcorp's commitment to transparent communication regarding its performance, especially concerning diagnostics demand and drug development trends, for which investors and industry stakeholders will be scrutinizing the upcoming results.

feed.title: Are Investors Undervaluing General Motors (GM) Right Now?
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) appears to be undervalued according to Zacks' analysis, which highlights its strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and an 'A' grade for Value. The article points to GM's favorable PEG ratio of 1.22 compared to its industry average of 3.24, and a P/S ratio of 0.36 versus the industry's 0.52, suggesting potential for profit for value investors. These metrics, combined with a positive earnings outlook, position GM as a strong value stock in the current market.

feed.title: ADP 401(k) Investors Advance ERISA Suit Challenging Plan Fees
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing Inc. (ADP) is unable to escape a lawsuit alleging breach of fiduciary duty and prohibited transaction claims under ERISA. A district court judge ruled that genuine disputes of material fact remain concerning allegations that ADP imprudently retained underperforming target date funds in its retirement plan and that the plan engaged in prohibited transactions by covering certain expenses. The ruling indicates that a trial is needed to resolve these issues, particularly regarding ADP's monitoring process for the target date funds.

feed.title: Can New Drugs Drive J&J's Innovative Medicine Despite Stelara LOE?
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson's Innovative Medicine unit is expected to see growth in Q1 2026 driven by key products like Darzalex and newer therapies, but faces significant pressure from the loss of exclusivity for Stelara and biosimilar competition. The company is introducing new drugs and indications, such as Inlexzoh/TAR-200, Imaavy, and Icotyde, to counteract these declines. Investors will focus on the performance of these new products and the impact of generic competition on older drugs.

feed.title: Pathfinder Bancorp Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend for Shareholders
feed.summary: Pathfinder Bancorp (PBHC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its common stock and warrants, payable on May 8, 2026. This decision reflects the company's commitment to shareholder value, despite its mixed financial performance and a "Neutral" rating from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, influenced by strong cash flow but declining revenue and a high P/E ratio.

feed.title: Federal permit for Nevada lithium-boron mine survives court challenge
feed.summary: Ioneer Ltd (ASX: INR, NASDAQ: IONR) announced that the U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada upheld the approval of its Rhyolite Ridge mine plan. This ruling dismisses challenges to the project, which aims to mine lithium and boron in Nevada, strengthening the U.S. supply chain for critical minerals. The court found that federal agencies complied with environmental acts in their review, paving the way for the project to advance.

feed.title: IMUNON Reports 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update Highlighting Significant Progress with Pivotal Phase 3 Study
feed.summary: IMUNON, Inc. (Nasdaq: IMNN) reported its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, detailing a net loss of $14.5 million. The company highlighted significant progress in its pivotal Phase 3 OVATION 3 Study for IMNN-001 in advanced ovarian cancer, with final Phase 2 data showing continued improvements in median overall survival. IMUNON also discussed its PlaCCine DNA vaccine technology and strategic efforts to reduce operating expenses while advancing its lead candidate.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Wells Fargo (WFC) AI-Led Strategy And New Fixed-Income Issuance
feed.summary: Wells Fargo recently issued new fixed-income offerings and launched an FX payments integration, while also emphasizing an AI-led strategy. CEO Charlie Scharf highlighted economic resilience and AI opportunities despite market volatility. Investors are evaluating the bank's earnings growth potential, efficiency improvements, and ongoing regulatory compliance in light of these developments.

feed.title: MFA Financial, Inc. Experiences Evaluation Revision Amid Mixed Market Performance Indicators
feed.summary: MFA Financial, Inc. has undergone an evaluation revision due to changing market conditions, with its stock currently priced at $9.44. The company shows mixed technical performance and varying returns compared to the S&P 500 across different timeframes. While outperforming year-to-date and significantly over five years, it has underperformed in the past year, highlighting its fluctuating market position within the realty sector.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Plans $0.35 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share, payable on June 3rd to shareholders of record as of April 30th, resulting in an annualized payout of $1.40 and an 8.9% yield. The dividend is considered sustainable with a payout ratio of 56.0% and projected earnings of $2.49 per share next year. Despite positive dividend growth, analyst sentiment is cautious, with an average rating of "Reduce" and an average price target of $18.29.

feed.title: J.Jill, Inc. (NYSE:JILL) Declares Dividend Increase - $0.09 Per Share
feed.summary: J.Jill, Inc. (NYSE:JILL) has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.09 per share, a 12.5% rise from its previous $0.08, payable on April 28th to shareholders of record by April 14th. This increase suggests an annualized yield of about 3.2% and is well-covered by the company's earnings, with a low payout ratio of 8.6%. Despite beating Q1 earnings expectations, the stock recently saw a significant drop of 24.5% to $11.30 on heavy trading volume.

feed.title: Brookfield Business Corp (BBU) unifies BBU and BBHC under single share structure
feed.summary: Brookfield Business Corporation completed a corporate reorganization on March 27, 2026, consolidating Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (BBU) and Brookfield Business Holdings Corporation (BBHC) under a single share structure. All BBU units, BBHC exchangeable shares, and related partnership units were exchanged for new Class A subordinate voting shares of Brookfield Business Corporation on a one-for-one basis. This reorganization aims to simplify the corporate structure, with BBU serving as the accounting predecessor, and management currently has no plans for material changes to the combined operations.

feed.title: FS Bancorp Inc (FSBW) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article appears to be a stub or an incorrectly extracted piece of content, as it only contains an advertisement for Capital.com. It does not provide any information regarding FS Bancorp Inc (FSBW) stock price, quotes, or charts, as suggested by its title. The content is essentially an ad for an online trading app.

feed.title: Idaho Strategic Resources (IDR) Posts Record 2025 Results as Gold Output and Reserves Grow
feed.summary: Idaho Strategic Resources (IDR) reported record operating and financial results for 2025, with revenue up 64.6% to $42.4 million and net income increasing 89.2% to $16.7 million. The company produced 12,538 ounces of gold, a 5.2% increase from 2024, and significantly grew its proven and probable reserves at the Golden Chest Mine by 53.2%. For 2026, IDR aims to continue growing production, advance the Murray Mill buildout, and explore its rare earth land package.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Hitek Global Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation - HKIT
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims on behalf of Hitek Global Inc. (NASDAQ: HKIT) shareholders. This investigation stems from allegations that Hitek Global Inc. may have provided misleading business information to investors. The firm is preparing a class action lawsuit to recover losses for affected investors, with no upfront fees under a contingency arrangement.

feed.title: ALDX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Aldeyra made false and misleading statements regarding inconsistent clinical trial results for its reproxalap drug candidate. Investors who purchased shares during this period have until May 29, 2026, to move the Court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Banco Bradesco Shareholders Back Bradseg Spin-Off in March 31, 2026 Meeting
feed.summary: Banco Bradesco S.A. shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the partial spin-off of Bradseg Participações S.A. and the absorption of the spun-off portion by Banco Bradesco during a Special Shareholders’ Meeting. This decision, with near-unanimous votes, authorizes Bradesco's management to proceed with the transaction, aiming to streamline corporate organization and enhance operational efficiency. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates BBD as Neutral, noting volatile cash flow and revenue decline despite profitability, but sees constructive technical momentum and a reasonable value/dividend setup.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Dispute Reaches US Congress, USMCA Table
feed.summary: The US House of Representatives has passed HR 7084, "The Defense of American Property Abroad Act of 2026," which would allow the president to deny US port access to vessels using expropriated infrastructure, directly targeting Mexico's 2022 suspension of Vulcan Materials' limestone operations. This bill escalates a dispute already being discussed in USMCA renegotiations, where the Calica case is a significant point of contention. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum denies expropriation and states negotiations with Vulcan are ongoing, focusing on alternative mining sites due to environmental concerns.

feed.title: iSpecimen Delays Annual Report Filing Briefly
feed.summary: iSpecimen (ISPC) has announced a brief delay in filing its annual Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, due to difficulties in gathering and compiling necessary information. The company anticipates filing the report within the 15-day extension period permitted by SEC rules and does not foresee any significant changes to its financial results compared to the previous year. ISPC currently holds a Sell rating from analysts with a $0.34 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates it Neutral due to weak financial performance and technicals.

feed.title: Clarivate Investors Can Proceed With Suit Against Citigroup, PwC
feed.summary: A federal judge has ruled that Clarivate Plc investors can proceed with a class action lawsuit against the data analytics company, its underwriter Citigroup Global Markets Inc., and its auditor PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. The lawsuit alleges material misstatements in a pair of 2021 public offerings, citing significant discrepancies between original disclosures and later restated financial figures. This decision emphasizes the legal risks faced by companies, underwriters, and auditors regarding accurate financial disclosures to investors.

feed.title: Louisiana-Pacific Corp (LPX) Growth Outlook Intact Despite Inventory Movements
feed.summary: Oppenheimer reiterated an Outperform rating on Louisiana-Pacific Corp (LPX) with a $115 price target, despite the stock underperforming the market. The firm believes the company's first-quarter 2026 guidance indicates above-market growth and expects over $500 million in siding EBITDA by 2027. Louisiana-Pacific is projected to see full-year siding net sales of $1.7 billion, and Oppenheimer maintains that underlying fundamentals remain strong despite inventory movements affecting current results.
